notes: HAR-402 live capture for saved-search resource-specific roots. PRODUCT, COLLECTION, ORDER, DRAFT_ORDER, FILE, and DISCOUNT_REDEEM_CODE creates succeed and are visible through matching roots; CUSTOMER create returns Shopify's deprecation userError with field null. PRICE_RULE creation is excluded from this live fixture because the current conformance token returns ACCESS_DENIED for savedSearchCreate with that resource type, so code/automatic discount PRICE_RULE routing remains runtime-test-backed. Shopify 2026-04 rejects query: on most saved-search connection roots, so this scenario uses valid first-only root reads.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy creates a deterministic local Product SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the Product legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The proxy creates a deterministic local Collection SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the Collection legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The proxy creates a deterministic local Order SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the Order legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The proxy creates a deterministic local DraftOrder SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the DraftOrder legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The proxy creates a deterministic local File SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the File legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The proxy creates a deterministic local DiscountRedeemCode SavedSearch id while Shopify returned a live store id.
The proxy derives the DiscountRedeemCode legacy id from its deterministic local SavedSearch id while Shopify returned the live store legacy id.
The downstream Product root returns the deterministic local SavedSearch id instead of Shopify's live id.
The downstream Product root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The downstream Collection root returns the deterministic local SavedSearch id instead of Shopify's live id.
The downstream Collection root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The downstream Order root appends the deterministic local SavedSearch after captured default order saved searches.
The downstream Order root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The downstream DraftOrder root appends the deterministic local SavedSearch after captured default draft-order saved searches.
The downstream DraftOrder root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The downstream File root returns the deterministic local SavedSearch id instead of Shopify's live id.
The downstream File root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The downstream DiscountRedeemCode root returns the deterministic local SavedSearch id instead of Shopify's live id.
The downstream DiscountRedeemCode root returns the deterministic local legacy id instead of Shopify's live legacy id.
The proxy deletes its deterministic local Product SavedSearch id while Shopify deleted the live store id.
